days.text: Cloudy. Showers, heavy at first. Occasional thunderstorms. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy. Showers, heavy at times. Occasional thunderstorms. Force 3 to 4 east to southeasterly winds, occasionally force 5 with gusts.
Cloudy. Showers. A few thunderstorms. Force 4 to 5 southeasterly winds with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. Occasional showers. Showers will ease off later. Force 3 to 4 southeasterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. A few showers. Force 3 to 4 south to southeasterly winds.
